popularStory.headline: The Brothers Wyman
popularStory.description: Francis and John Wyman were born at Westmill, Hertsfordshire, England and baptized there in the Church of St. Mary. Westmill is just south of Cambridge, which was a chief source of the puritan moveme …

zh.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Wyman於1619年2月24日出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾時，他的父親Francis Wyman27歲，母親Elizabeth Richardson26歲。他於1644年1月30日與Judith Pierce在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他去世於1699年11月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年80歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Wyman于1619年2月24日出生在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾时，他的父亲Francis Wyman27岁，母亲Elizabeth Richardson26岁。他于1644年1月30日与Judith Pierce在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他去世于1699年11月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年80岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Wyman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wymund, Wymond (Old English Wīgmund, composed of the elements wīg ‘war’ + mund ‘protection’). In Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, and Norfolk the personal name may be the Old Norse cognate Vigmundr, Vimund.
Americanized form of North German   Weimann  . Compare   Wiman  .
History: John Wyman, from Hertfordshire, England, was one of the founders of Woburn, MA, in 1640.

variants.name: Weyman
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): variant of   Wyman   or   Waitman  .
Americanized form of German Weymann: variant of Weimann .

variants.name: Wiman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Holger, Sten.

Swedish: ornamental name composed of an altered form of the placename element vi (representing either Old Norse vithr ‘forest’ or vé ‘sacred place’) + man ‘man’, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with the element vi.
English: variant of   Wyman  . This form of the surname is virtually non-existing in Britain.

variants.name: Weimann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Wilhelm, Kurt, Fritz, Hans, Helmuth, Juergen, Reinhold.

variants.name: Wayment
meanings: English: variant of Waymont, a variant of Wyman .

variants.name: Wayman
meanings: English: variant of   Wyman   and   Waitman  .
Americanized form of German   Wehmann   and   Weidmann  .

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Wyman was born on 24 February 1619, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Francis Wyman, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Richardson, was 26. He married Judith Pierce on 30 January 1644, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 28 November 1699, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80, and was buried in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Wyman est né le 24 février 1619, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Francis Wyman, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Richardson, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Judith Pierce le 30 janvier 1644, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 28 novembre 1699, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

Januar 1644 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Judith Pierce geheiratet. Er starb am 28. Lui sposato Judith Pierce il 30 gennaio 1644, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 28 novembre 1699, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Westmill, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミル
ja.lifeSummary: Francis Wymanが1619年2月24日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで生まれた時，父Francis Wymanは27歳，母Elizabeth Richardsonは26歳であった。1644年1月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでJudith Pierceと結婚した。彼は1699年11月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで80歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: Francis Wyman(이)가 1619년 2월 24일 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Wyman(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Richardson(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1644년 1월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Judith Pierce(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1699년 11월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Wyman nasceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1619, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Francis Wyman, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Richardson, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith Pierce em 30 de janeiro de 1644, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1699, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Wyman родился 24 февраля 1619 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Francis Wyman было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Richardson, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Pierce 30 января 1644 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 28 ноября 1699 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
